truth_surfaces.expected_state: BurnLens 0.50.0 reports a blocked six-event dataset candidate and contingency-only portfolio status.
truth_surfaces.observed_state: The current branch states that no dataset, split, baseline, or model is authorized and that the August 6 bundle is an interim contingency.

truth_surfaces.expected_state: P2O5-T02 blocks on source-regime split fitness and identifies one replacement event as the smallest credible remediation.
truth_surfaces.observed_state: The current branch records the exact block and schedule impact.
Bytes and replay are verified; the owner confirms correct desktop and narrow-width rendering.
PR #553 merges at 85f827ef6a7ab2e3f2afea7b17d94677cd557b3e and issue #552 is closed.

truth_surfaces.expected_state: Annotated tag peels to the exact verified merge.

limitations: The labels are owner-approved prototype evidence, not independent ground truth.
The six-event candidate fails leakage-resistant split fitness because one source regime has only one event.
Dataset, split, baseline, and model versions remain null; training remains unauthorized.
The August 6 bundle remains an interim contingency technical case study, not the intended final portfolio submission.

decision.rationale: Scientific-decision integrity, reproducibility, fresh-main tests and outputs, canonical package, isolated installation, PNG, exact HTML rendering, claims, privacy, merge, and remote tag checks all pass. The verified release truth is a transparent dataset-readiness block, not a dataset authorization.
decision.next_action: Activate P2O4-T39 / issue #554 from exact verified main and begin its fresh official-source preflight. No dataset, split, baseline, or model work may begin.
